title: Item Armor
description: This mod adds a variety of new armor from vanilla items
body:
### NOTE: THIS MOD IS CURRENTLY IN ALPHA AND MAY NOT CONTAIN EVERY ARMOR. GO TO THE ISSUES LINK AND TELL ME WHAT ARMOR YOU WANT NEXT
------------

## Why should you add this mod?
Safety: Who doesn't hate that there is only 5 types of armors? And who doesn't hate when the required materials are missing for the last piece of armor and don't want to grind for 4 diamonds? With this mod this is no problem anymore! With any item you wish for you can craft armor with (not containing block items) to keep you safer than having one piece missing. Also it would make the start of a new hardcore survival world a bit easier due to getting some items quick and make armor out of it.

Style: Combine different kind of armors together to make other people jealous of your new style. Now having even more colors than without this mod.

Decoration: Don't want to wear it? No problem putting the armor on armor stands in your home would definetly make a cool new decoration.
